summary: Short blog recap of Cavallo sponsoring and attending the Pacific Hoof Care Practitioners (PHCP) conference, with photos of the team meeting hoof care professionals.
Announcement introducing UK horsewoman Emma Massingale as Cavallo's new Global Ambassador, covering her natural horsemanship work, BBC documentary, and her endorsement of Cavallo Hoof Boots.
Educational post on spotting equine soreness, focusing on saddle fit and hoof function as the two main 'hot spots' and the warning signs of a poorly fitting saddle.
Customer review feature highlighting a positive Facebook testimonial about Cavallo ELB hoof boots and the company's responsive customer service replacing a defective boot.
Light Cinderella-themed promotional post about Cavallo's sparkly bling hoof boots, featuring a video produced by Global Ambassador Emma Massingale and her horses.
First-person travel story about visiting the Australian Outback near Alice Springs in search of wild Brumbies, reflecting on dangerous wildlife and horse safety.
Story of a Japanese barefoot enthusiast, Chika, who researched Cavallo via YouTube and traveled to Equitana in Melbourne to buy Cavallo hoof boots for her horse.
Feature on Teddy the Shetland, a famous London therapy pony and Instagram celebrity, fitted with Cavallo CLB 'Bling' hoof boots for red-carpet appearances.
Cavallo's January 2019 'Friends of Cavallo' roundup covering magazine features, Monty Roberts' PTSD equine therapy program, and other community news.
Reflective post about Belinde De Bruyckere's sculpture 'We are all Flesh' seen at an Adelaide art gallery, exploring its meaning on mortality and human vulnerability.
February 2019 collection of customer testimonials, including an x-ray founder-recovery story crediting Cavallo Hoof Boots with helping a horse walk sound again.
Cavallo's February 2019 'Friends of Cavallo' roundup featuring Emma Massingale's European tricycle trip, an MS rider's boot review, and Monty Roberts' symposium.
